nasb.text: “Now Lord, You are releasing Your bond-servant to depart in peace, According to Your word;

esv.text: “Lord, now you are letting your servant depart in peace, according to your word;

cnv.text: “主啊，現在照你的話， 釋放僕人平平安安地去吧！

ccb.text: “主啊，现在你的话已经成就， 可以让你的奴仆安然离世了，

csbs.text: “主啊， 现在可以照你的话， 让你的奴仆平平安安地离去，
